data.name: Apex - Office Safety Inspection Checklist - New

entries.label: Office Inspections are to be performed MONTHLY. Comments and corrective actions are required for all negative (No) responses. Office Inspections are to be documented, reviewed by the Division/Branch Manager, and submitted.
*** Please select "CSW" if you are in the Commercial Stormwater Division ***
1.3 Safety communication board up to date?
1.4 Are any chemicals stored in the office?
1.4.1 If "yes" - are SDSs readily available for the chemicals?
2.1 First aid supplies available where easily accessible and in a prominent location?
2.2 Are any first aid kit supplies expired?
2.3 Bloodborne pathogens kit readily available and stored with latex gloves and microshield?
2.5 Emergency action plan readily available and updated?
2.6 Evacuation route posted with meeting location identified?
2.7 Emergency exits marked & clear for egress?
2.8 Emergency telephone numbers posted at each phone?
2.9 Fire extinguishers wall-mounted, readily accessible and easily identifiable?
2.11 Fire extinguishers inspection tag(s) present and up to date?
2.12 Has a fire drill been conducted (documented) this calendar year?
3.1 Does office location have a warehouse/garage/shop (if "No", skip this section)?
3.2 Are any chemicals stored in the warehouse/garage/shop?
3.2.1 If "Yes" - are SDSs readily available for each of the chemicals?
3.3.1 If "Yes" - is an eyewash station and spill kit readily available?
3.4 Are aisleways and emergency exit routes clear?
3.5 Are floors clean, dry, and free of slip/trip hazards?
3.6 Have emergency light(s) been tested (once every 30 days)?
3.7 Is vehicle maintenance or washing being conducted?
4.1 Are floors clean, dry, and free of slip/trip hazards (including breakrooms)?
4.2 Are stored materials stacked safely and properly secured?
4.3 Are stored materials more than 19 inches from ceilings?
4.4 File cabinet drawers closed when not in use?
4.5.1 Are space heaters allowed by lease documents?
4.5.2 If allowed, are space heaters UL stamped and located at least 12 inches from combustible materials?
4.8 Emergency stairwells clearly marked with exit sign?
4.10 Are emergency egress aisles and stairway clear and free from obstructions?
5.1 Are electrical plugs, outlets, cords in good condition and not missing covers, taped or broken?
5.2 Are extension cords across aisles/walkways secured and marked to prevent slip, trip, falls?
5.3 If power strips are used, they are not "daisy-chained"?
5.4 Are electrical panels accessible and clear of obstructions (min 36-inches)?
